Responsive Resume

About me

Nicolás Castro

Electronic Engineer and Developer


Thanks for stoping by!

Undergraduate student of Electronic Engineering. Enrolled in a dual program for obtaining a Professional degree in Electronic Engineering and Master in Science of Electronic Engineering. Responsible, proactive and enthusiastic, with an inclination to resolving challenging problems from a critic and constructive perspective. I am searching for an opportunity that allows me to reach goals and expand my professional horizon, as well as improve my leadership, project management, and research skills.

Here you can find mi curriculum in English or Spanish

In Conclusion

This is a good spot to highlight experiance and skills. Make sure to include a call to action like a link to your website, or your email address. If you find bugs, want features, or have questions, feel free to submit an issue. You are free to use without attribution. If you're ok sharing, I would love seeing what you make! Shoot me an email or tweet at me.
